generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm concerned about the growing burden our allies aren't pulling their weight. The latest reports show that only 32% of NATO members meet the 2% defense spending target. This isn't just about money—it's about our readiness to face real threats. We can't afford to be the only ones stepping up when our allies are cutting corners. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
